aeo_targets.our_strategy: Create a Canvas Homes-branded hub with Bangalore locality-wise rates, bank availability, and real property listings integrated. Include local pack optimization with branch locations and contact info.
Build an advanced EMI calculator with AI-powered eligibility prediction, salary-to-loan mapping, and prepayment scenarios. Cite this in our hub to win AI overview citations.
Create expert-backed rate forecast article with monthly updates, Budget 2026 analysis, and RBI policy tracking. Position as the most current source to capture AI overview.
Develop a comprehensive comparison guide with scoring methodology (rate, processing fee, documentation, approval time). Include Canvas Homes' unique value prop for property-linked loans.
Create a national guide with Bangalore deep-dive, covering eligibility, rates, subsidy schemes, and Budget 2026 impact. Optimize for AI overview with structured data.
Build interactive tool that calculates eligibility based on salary, age, employment type, and existing loans. Integrate with Canvas Homes property listings for seamless UX.

competitor_insights.weakness: Generic national content; lacks Bangalore-specific insights, locality-wise rates, and integration with property listings. No unique value for Canvas Homes users.

competitor_insights.strength: Own branded queries and have direct transactional intent. Strong for 'home loan calculator' and 'home loan EMI calculator' with native tools.
competitor_insights.weakness: Only promote their own products; no comparative analysis. Canvas Homes can position as neutral, comprehensive guide that helps users choose the best bank.

competitor_insights.weakness: Finance-only platform; no property integration. Canvas Homes can differentiate by linking home loans to actual Bangalore properties and neighborhoods.

analysis.seasonal_notes: Search interest is declining_fast (41.5 vs 59.3 average), indicating strong seasonality. Likely peaks during: (1) Budget announcement season (Feb), (2) Financial year-end (Mar-Apr), (3) Post-monsoon property buying season (Oct-Nov). Current decline suggests off-season; recommend content refresh around Budget 2026 (Feb) and Q3 property season (Oct-Nov) for maximum visibility.
